TIBERIUS, A.D. 14-37. AV Aureus (7.77 gms), Lugdunum Mint, ca. A.D. 18-35. NGC EF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 2/5. Brushed, Scuffs.
To view all items from the John P. Burnham Collection, click  here.
RIC-29; Calico-305a. "Tribute Penny" type, group 4. Obverse: Laureate head right; one ribbon on shoulder; Reverse: Livia (as Pax) seated right on chair, with feet on footstool, holding scepter and olive branch; ornate chair legs. Well-centered on a broad round flan. Some marks and a scuff across the emp...
